description: From the Publisher Other Colouring Books by De-ann Black De-ann Black is an author and artist. All her colouring books are hand drawn from her original artwork. Other colouring books by De-ann: Summer Nature, Flower Nature, Christmas Theme, Spring Garden, Bee Garden, Summer Garden, Festive Christmas, Autumn Garden, Flower Bee, Wild Garden, Stargazer Space, Faerie Garden Spring, Flower Hunter, Sea Dream, Scottish Garden Seasons and Christmas Garden.
